text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki has a dance rehearsal today.
Although she approaches the rehearsal with great
determination...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm?! I'm so sorry! I've done it again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's dance starts off well, but as she
spins she gets overexcited and ends up
repeatedly striking at empty air.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Please excuse that display... Dance and martial
arts share common principles, so I thought it
would be simpler to perform my dance like I
would a martial arts kata.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But that was a dangerous pitfall. I got so involved
that, before I knew it, visions of enemies were
appearing before me one after another!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Please... let me try again! This time, I'll be sure to
quell the fierce blaze within me!
choice_data_list: Uh, why don't we take a breather!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This might actually be a serious problem. If her
fierce blaze is left unchecked and spirals out of
control mid-performance...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Haaa... Osu!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Good heavens! She took out everyone onstage in
seconds!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no telling what could happen.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Basically, I put too much strength into each
movement, and that affords my killer instinct an
opening. I was warned about it often at the
dojo...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If only I could ease my strength and move with
more fluidity!
choice_data_list:
Try imagining that you're evading an enemy's
attacks.

Multiply the number of enemies you're fighting
by one hundred!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I see! I'll sway like a willow in the breeze and
evade without a thought to countering!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This approach should prove useful in my martial
arts training as well. Thank you! I feel like a path
forward has opened.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Okay! Now, I have a favor to ask of you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'd like you to try to strike me while I'm dancing!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It will be far more effective than with imagination
alone. And I'm sure I'll learn a lot if I'm able to get
through it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Now, don't hold back! Come at me with all your
might!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I also end up exhausted, Yaeno Muteki
successfully learns to move as fluidly as water.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what? Wouldn't that result in an even greater
loss of control?
choice_data_list: But what happens if you're pushed to the limit?
But what happens if you're pushed to the limit?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Now I see! With that many enemies, I'd have
no means of combating them all, and no choice
but to let them flow by!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A ground-shattering idea... I knew you would
deliver, Trainer! Let's start training immediately!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Now, to focus!

text_block_list.name: Illusory Warrior Legion
text_block_list.text:
Muahaha! How foolish that you would knock so
willingly on death's door! Behold our unstoppable
power!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Not a single one of your strikes will land!
Awaken, water still!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While presumably conjuring the mental image of
a hundred enemies, Yaeno Muteki performs a
gorgeous and elegant dance... With that
challenge overcome, we get ready to face many
more!
